name: Blackwing - Hillen the Tengu-wind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のヒレン
desc: When you take 2000 or more Battle Damage from your opponent's monster's direct attack while this card is in the Graveyard, you can select 1 Level 3 or lower "Blackwing" monster in your Graveyard. Special Summon that monster and this card from the Graveyard. Their effects are negated. Each player can only use the effect of "Blackwing - Hillen the Tengu-wind" once per Duel.
flavor: When you take 2000 or more Battle Damage from your opponent's monster's direct attack while this card is in the Graveyard, you can select 1 Level 3 or lower "Blackwing" monster in your Graveyard. Special Summon that monster and this card from the Graveyard. Their effects are negated. Each player can only use the effect of "Blackwing - Hillen the Tengu-wind" once per Duel.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
